tEn: Images Speak in Images: A Generalist Painter for In-Context Visual Learning
tZh: 图像以图像言说：面向上下文视觉学习的通才画家
sEn: Painter redefines vision tasks as image-to-image problems, enabling in-context learning with image prompts.
sZh: Painter将视觉任务重新定义为图像到图像的问题，通过图像提示实现上下文学习。
absEn: In-context learning, as a new paradigm in NLP, allows the model to rapidly adapt to various tasks with only a handful of prompts and examples. But in computer vision, the difficulties for in-context learning lie in that tasks vary significantly in the output representations, thus it is unclear how to define the general-purpose task prompts that the vision model can understand and transfer to out-of-domain tasks. In this work, we present Painter, a generalist model which addresses these obstacles with an "image"-centric solution, that is, to redefine the output of core vision tasks as images, and specify task prompts as also images. With this idea, our training process is extremely simple, which performs standard masked image modeling on the stitch of input and output image pairs. This makes the model capable of performing tasks conditioned on visible image patches. Thus, during inference, we can adopt a pair of input and output images from the same task as the input condition, to indicate which task to perform. Without bells and whistles, our generalist Painter can achieve competitive performance compared to well-established task-specific models, on seven representative vision tasks ranging from high-level visual understanding to low-level image processing. In addition, Painter significantly outperforms recent generalist models on several challenging tasks.
absZh: 上下文学习作为自然语言处理中的新范式，允许模型仅凭少量提示和示例快速适应各种任务。但在计算机视觉中，上下文学习的困难在于任务在输出表示上差异显著，因此如何定义视觉模型能够理解并迁移到域外任务的通用任务提示尚不明确。在这项工作中，我们提出了Painter，一个通才模型，它通过以“图像”为中心的解决方案来应对这些障碍，即重新定义核心视觉任务的输出为图像，并将任务提示也指定为图像。基于这一想法，我们的训练过程极其简单，即在输入和输出图像对的拼接上进行标准的掩码图像建模。这使得模型能够根据可见图像块执行任务。因此，在推理时，我们可以采用来自同一任务的一对输入和输出图像作为输入条件，以指示要执行的任务。无需繁琐的附加组件，我们的通才Painter在从高层视觉理解到低层图像处理的七个代表性视觉任务上，能够与成熟的任务特定模型取得竞争性表现。此外，Painter在几个具有挑战性的任务上显著优于近期的通才模型。

contrib.en: Proposes Painter, a generalist model that redefines vision task outputs as images and uses image pairs as task prompts.
contrib.zh: 提出Painter通用模型，将视觉任务输出重定义为图像，并使用图像对作为任务提示。

contrib.en: Unifies seven diverse vision tasks (depth, segmentation, keypoint, restoration) into a single masked image modeling framework.
contrib.zh: 将七种不同视觉任务（深度、分割、关键点、恢复）统一到单一掩码图像建模框架中。

contrib.en: Achieves competitive performance against task-specific models on multiple benchmarks, with state-of-the-art on NYUv2 depth estimation.
contrib.zh: 在多个基准上达到与专用模型竞争的性能，在NYUv2深度估计上达到最先进水平。

contrib.en: Demonstrates in-context learning capability for both in-domain and out-of-domain tasks using visual prompts.
contrib.zh: 展示了使用视觉提示对域内和域外任务进行上下文学习的能力。

contrib.en: Shows that joint training across tasks can improve performance compared to separate training on most tasks.
contrib.zh: 表明跨任务联合训练在大多数任务上优于单独训练。

contrib.en: Introduces a simple prompt selection and learning method that further improves task performance.
contrib.zh: 引入简单的提示选择和学习方法，进一步提升了任务性能。

limits.en: Performance on panoptic segmentation lags behind specialized models due to lower input resolution.
limits.zh: 由于输入分辨率较低，全景分割性能落后于专用模型。

limits.en: The image-based interface is not naturally suited for modeling discrete language signals.
limits.zh: 基于图像的接口不自然适用于建模离散语言信号。

limits.en: Joint training slightly hurts performance on keypoint detection, indicating task conflicts.
limits.zh: 联合训练在关键点检测上性能略有下降，表明存在任务冲突。

limits.en: The approach requires careful design of output image representations for each task.
limits.zh: 该方法需要为每个任务精心设计输出图像表示。

limits.en: Out-of-domain generalization is only qualitatively shown; quantitative evaluation is limited.
limits.zh: 域外泛化仅定性展示，定量评估有限。

items.en: In-context learning, as a new paradigm in NLP, allows the model to rapidly adapt to various tasks with only a handful of prompts and examples. But in computer vision, the difficulties for in-context learning lie in that tasks vary significantly in the output representations, thus it is unclear how to define the general-purpose task prompts that the vision model can understand and transfer to out-of-domain tasks. In this work, we present Painter, a generalist model which addresses these obstacles with an “image”-centric solution, that is, to redefine the output of core vision tasks as images, and specify task prompts as also images. With this idea, our training process is extremely simple, which performs standard masked image modeling on the stitch of input and output image pairs. This makes the model capable of performing tasks conditioned on visible image patches. Thus, during inference, we can adopt a pair of input and output images from the same task as the input condition, to indicate which task to perform. Without bells and whistles, our generalist Painter can achieve competitive performance compared to well-established task-specific models, on seven representative vision tasks ranging from high-level visual understanding to low-level image processing. In addition, Painter significantly outperforms recent generalist models on several challenging tasks.
items.zh: 上下文学习作为自然语言处理中的一种新范式，允许模型仅通过少量提示和示例快速适应各种任务。但在计算机视觉中，上下文学习的困难在于任务在输出表示上差异很大，因此如何定义视觉模型能够理解并迁移到域外任务的通用任务提示尚不明确。在这项工作中，我们提出了Painter，一个通用模型，它通过一种以“图像”为中心的解决方案解决了这些障碍，即重新定义核心视觉任务的输出为图像，并将任务提示也指定为图像。基于这一想法，我们的训练过程极其简单，即在输入和输出图像对的拼接上执行标准的掩码图像建模。这使得模型能够根据可见图像块执行任务。因此，在推理过程中，我们可以采用来自同一任务的一对输入和输出图像作为输入条件，以指示要执行的任务。无需花哨的组件，我们的通用Painter在七个代表性视觉任务上（从高层视觉理解到低层图像处理）能够与成熟的任务专用模型相媲美。此外，Painter在几个具有挑战性的任务上显著优于最近的通用模型。

items.en: Training one generalist model that can execute diverse tasks simultaneously, and even can perform a new task given a prompt and very few examples, is one important step closer to artificial general intelligence. In NLP, the emergence of in-context learning [7, 2, 18] presents a new path in this direction, which uses language sequences as the general interface and allows the model to rapidly adapt to various language-centric tasks with only a handful of prompts and examples.
items.zh: 训练一个能够同时执行多种任务，甚至能在给定提示和极少量示例的情况下执行新任务的通用模型，是迈向通用人工智能的重要一步。在自然语言处理中，上下文学习的出现[7, 2, 18]为此方向提供了一条新路径，它使用语言序列作为通用接口，允许模型仅通过少量提示和示例快速适应各种以语言为中心的任务。

items.en: Thus far, in computer vision, in-context learning is rarely explored and remains unclear how to achieve that. This can be attributed to the differences between two modalities. One difference is that NLP tasks mainly consist of language understanding and generation, so their output spaces can be unified as sequences of discrete language tokens. But vision tasks are the abstractions of raw visual input to varied granularity and angles. Thus, vision tasks vary significantly in output representations, leading to various task-specific loss functions and architecture designs. The second difference is that the output space of NLP tasks is even the same as the input. Thus, the task instruction and the example’s input/output, which are all language-token sequences, can be directly used as the input condition (also denoted as the task prompt), which can be processed straightforwardly by the large language model. However, in computer vision, it is unclear how to define general-purpose task prompts or instructions that the vision model can understand and transfer to out-of-domain tasks. Several recent attempts [9, 10, 27, 35, 41, 6] tackle these difficulties by following the solutions in NLP. They more-or-less convert vision problems into NLP ones via discretizing the continuous output spaces of vision tasks, and using the language or specially-designed discrete tokens as the task prompts.
items.zh: 迄今为止，在计算机视觉中，上下文学习很少被探索，且如何实现它仍不明确。这可以归因于两种模态之间的差异。一个差异是，自然语言处理任务主要包括语言理解和生成，因此它们的输出空间可以统一为离散语言标记的序列。但视觉任务是对原始视觉输入在不同粒度和角度上的抽象。因此，视觉任务在输出表示上差异很大，导致各种任务特定的损失函数和架构设计。第二个差异是，自然语言处理任务的输出空间甚至与输入相同。因此，任务指令和示例的输入/输出（都是语言标记序列）可以直接用作输入条件（也称为任务提示），可以由大型语言模型直接处理。然而，在计算机视觉中，如何定义视觉模型能够理解并迁移到域外任务的通用任务提示或指令尚不明确。最近的几次尝试[9, 10, 27, 35, 41, 6]通过遵循自然语言处理中的解决方案来应对这些困难。它们或多或少地将视觉问题转化为自然语言处理问题，通过离散化视觉任务的连续输出空间，并使用语言或专门设计的离散标记作为任务提示。

items.en: However, we believe that images speak in images, i.e., image itself is a natural interface for general-purpose visual perception. In this work, we address the above obstacles with a vision-centric solution. The core observation is that most dense-prediction vision problems can be formulated as image inpainting, i.e.:
items.zh: 然而，我们认为图像用图像说话，即图像本身是通用视觉感知的自然接口。在这项工作中，我们通过一种以视觉为中心的解决方案来解决上述障碍。核心观察是，大多数密集预测视觉问题可以表述为图像修复，即：

items.en: Given an input image, prediction is to inpaint the desired but missing output “image”.
items.zh: 给定输入图像，预测就是修复期望但缺失的输出“图像”。

items.en: Thus, we need a representation of 3-channel tensor that appears as an “image” for the output of the vision tasks, and specify the task prompts using a pair of images. Here we showcase several representative vision tasks for training, including depth estimation, human keypoint detection, semantic segmentation, instance segmentation, image denoising, image deraining, and image enhancement, and unify their output spaces using a 3-channel tensor, a.k.a. “output image”. We carefully design the data format for each task, such as instance mask and per-pixel discrete labels of panoptic segmentation, per-pixel continuous values of depth estimation, and high-precision coordinates of pose estimation. Including more tasks is very straightforward, as we only need to construct new data pairs and add them to the training set, without modifications to either the model architecture or loss function.
items.zh: 因此，我们需要一个3通道张量的表示，它看起来像视觉任务输出的“图像”，并使用一对图像来指定任务提示。这里我们展示了几个用于训练的代表性视觉任务，包括深度估计、人体关键点检测、语义分割、实例分割、图像去噪、图像去雨和图像增强，并使用3通道张量（即“输出图像”）统一它们的输出空间。我们为每个任务精心设计了数据格式，例如实例掩码和全景分割的逐像素离散标签、深度估计的逐像素连续值以及姿态估计的高精度坐标。包含更多任务非常直接，因为我们只需要构建新的数据对并将其添加到训练集中，无需修改模型架构或损失函数。

items.en: Based on this unification, we train a generalist Painter model with an extremely simple training process. During training, we stitch two images from the same task into a larger image, and so do their corresponding output images. Then we apply masked image modeling (MIM) on pixels of the output image, with the input image being the condition. With such a learning process, we enable the model to perform tasks conditioned on visible image patches, that is, the capability of in-context prediction with the visual signal as context.
items.zh: 基于这种统一，我们使用极其简单的训练过程训练了一个通用Painter模型。在训练期间，我们将来自同一任务的两张图像拼接成一张更大的图像，它们的对应输出图像也是如此。然后，我们在输出图像的像素上应用掩码图像建模，以输入图像为条件。通过这样的学习过程，我们使模型能够根据可见图像块执行任务，即利用视觉信号作为上下文进行上下文预测的能力。

items.en: Thus the trained model is capable of the in-context inference. That is, we directly use the input/output paired images from the same task as the input condition to indicate which task to perform. Examples of in-context inference are illustrated in Figure LABEL:fig:teaser, consisting of seven in-domain examples (seven rows at top) and three out-of-domain examples (three rows at bottom). This definition of task prompts does not require deep understanding of language instructions as need by almost all previous approaches, and makes it very flexible for performing both in-domain and out-of-domain vision tasks.
items.zh: 因此，训练后的模型具备上下文推理的能力。也就是说，我们直接使用来自同一任务的输入/输出配对图像作为输入条件，以指示要执行的任务。上下文推理的示例在图LABEL:fig:teaser中展示，包括七个域内示例（顶部七行）和三个域外示例（底部三行）。这种任务提示的定义不需要像几乎所有先前方法那样深入理解语言指令，并且使得执行域内和域外视觉任务都非常灵活。

items.en: Without bells and whistles, our model can achieve competitive performance compared to well-established task-specific models, on several fundamental vision tasks across high-level visual understanding to low-level image processing, namely, depth estimation on NYUv2 [37], semantic segmentation on ADE-20K [54], human keypoint detection on COCO [31], panoptic segmentation on COCO [31], and three low-level image restoration tasks. Notably, on depth estimation of NYUv2, our model achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming previous best results by large margins which have heavy and specialized designs on architectures and loss functions. Compared to other generalist models, Painter yields significant improvements on several challenging tasks.
items.zh: 无需花哨的组件，我们的模型在几个基础视觉任务上（从高层视觉理解到低层图像处理）能够与成熟的任务专用模型相媲美，这些任务包括NYUv2上的深度估计[37]、ADE-20K上的语义分割[54]、COCO上的人体关键点检测[31]、COCO上的全景分割[31]以及三个低层图像恢复任务。值得注意的是，在NYUv2的深度估计上，我们的模型达到了最先进的性能，大幅超越了之前的最佳结果，这些结果在架构和损失函数上有大量专门设计。与其他通用模型相比，Painter在几个具有挑战性的任务上取得了显著改进。

items.en: The emergence of Transformer [40] provides the possibility to share the basic modeling module across different modalities. Until now, Transformers are widely-adopted in language [12, 32, 7], vision [14, 33, 8, 9, 4], speech [13, 17, 24] and multimodal [34, 38, 23] domains. Perceiver [22] and Perceiver-IO [21] are the first attempts to use the exact same Transformer architecture in different domains, such as natural language and visual understanding processing, StarCraft II, and multi-modal domains. If the input could be transformed to a sequence of tokens, one can adopt Transformer for modeling the relationships between different tokens.
items.zh: Transformer的出现[40]提供了在不同模态之间共享基本建模模块的可能性。到目前为止，Transformer被广泛应用于语言[12, 32, 7]、视觉[14, 33, 8, 9, 4]、语音[13, 17, 24]和多模态[34, 38, 23]领域。Perceiver[22]和Perceiver-IO[21]是首次尝试在不同领域（如自然语言和视觉理解处理、星际争霸II和多模态领域）中使用完全相同的Transformer架构。如果输入可以转换为标记序列，则可以采用Transformer来建模不同标记之间的关系。

items.en: Due to the general modeling capability of Transformer, there are some efforts to unify different tasks in vision domains, resulting in several vision generalists [9, 10, 55, 35, 27]. DETR [8] first adopted Transformer as the task specific head for object detection. Based on this, Pix2Seq [9] defined the output space of object detection as a discrete space, and conduct this task in an auto-regressive manner. Due to the fundamental nature of object detection, Pix2Seq provides a direction for unifying different vision tasks using discrete spaces, thus motivating a lot of following work. Unified-IO [35] and OFA [41] both homogenize the diverse inputs and outputs to a sequence of discrete tokens, perform joint modeling in a sequence-to-sequence manner over vision, vision & language and NLP tasks, and use T5-style architectures [36] with billions of parameters, where Unified-IO unifies more tasks than OFA with larger size of models. Pix2Seq v2 [10] unified object detection, instance segmentation, keypoint estimation and image captioning in the same defined discrete spaces as Pix2Seq. UViM [27] unified pixel-labeling tasks with the same modeling approach but trained separate models for different tasks, such as panoptic segmentation, depth estimation and colorization.
items.zh: 由于Transformer的通用建模能力，有一些努力旨在统一视觉领域中的不同任务，从而产生了几个视觉通用模型[9, 10, 55, 35, 27]。DETR[8]首先采用Transformer作为目标检测的任务特定头。基于此，Pix2Seq[9]将目标检测的输出空间定义为离散空间，并以自回归方式执行此任务。由于目标检测的基础性质，Pix2Seq为使用离散空间统一不同视觉任务提供了方向，从而激励了许多后续工作。Unified-IO[35]和OFA[41]都将多样化的输入和输出同质化为离散标记序列，在视觉、视觉与语言以及自然语言处理任务上以序列到序列的方式进行联合建模，并使用具有数十亿参数的T5风格架构[36]，其中Unified-IO以更大的模型规模统一了比OFA更多的任务。Pix2Seq v2[10]在Pix2Seq定义的相同离散空间中统一了目标检测、实例分割、关键点估计和图像描述。UViM[27]使用相同的建模方法统一了像素标记任务，但为不同任务训练了单独的模型，例如全景分割、深度估计和着色。

items.en: Notably, from our point of view, the input of visual signals is continuous in nature, thus we try to make the output space of several representative vision tasks as continuous as images to reduce the quantization error caused by discretization and further enable the in-context visual learning with masked image modeling.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，从我们的角度来看，视觉信号的输入本质上是连续的，因此我们尝试使几个代表性视觉任务的输出空间像图像一样连续，以减少离散化引起的量化误差，并进一步通过掩码图像建模实现上下文视觉学习。

items.en: For the first time, GPT-3 [7] defined a new learning paradigm, in-context learning, where a series of NLP tasks can be formulated as the text completion task given prompts and examples. In-context learning grants models new capabilities to perform on-the-fly computational reasoning or novel-pattern recognition that is unlikely to have occurred in training. Flamingo [2] extended the input of the large language models to not only texts but also images and videos, but still used languages as the general interface, such that the model can perform many visual-linguistic tasks given prompts and examples, such as image captioning, visual question answering, optical character recognition (OCR), etc. In other domains, it appears non-trivial to directly introduce the in-context learning capability. AD [28] uses algorithm distillation to combine in-context capability with reinforcement learning. In computer vision, a concurrent work [6] performs inpainting on the figures and infographics from vision articles, but only works for predicting on discrete space as the language domain, and shows the in-context capability on foreground segmentation, single object detection and colorization. While the work [6] proves the concept of in-context learning for vision tasks, no results were reported on standard benchmark datasets. Thus, it remains unclear how the method performs on real-world datasets. In contrast, our model works well with masked image modeling on pixels on seven diverse and challenging vision tasks, including depth estimation, keypoint estimation, semantic segmentation, panoptic segmentation, image denoising, image deraining, and image enhancement, and also shows highly competitive performance on these tasks.
items.zh: GPT-3[7]首次定义了一种新的学习范式——上下文学习，其中一系列自然语言处理任务可以表述为给定提示和示例的文本补全任务。上下文学习赋予模型新的能力，使其能够执行即时计算推理或新颖模式识别，这些在训练中不太可能出现。Flamingo[2]将大型语言模型的输入扩展到不仅包括文本，还包括图像和视频，但仍然使用语言作为通用接口，使得模型能够执行许多视觉语言任务，例如图像描述、视觉问答、光学字符识别等。在其他领域，直接引入上下文学习能力似乎并非易事。AD[28]使用算法蒸馏将上下文能力与强化学习相结合。在计算机视觉中，一项并行工作[6]对视觉文章中的图形和信息图进行修复，但仅适用于在离散空间上进行预测（如语言领域），并展示了在前景分割、单目标检测和着色上的上下文能力。虽然工作[6]证明了视觉任务上下文学习的概念，但没有在标准基准数据集上报告结果。因此，该方法在真实世界数据集上的表现仍不清楚。相比之下，我们的模型在七个多样且具有挑战性的视觉任务上（包括深度估计、关键点估计、语义分割、全景分割、图像去噪、图像去雨和图像增强）通过像素上的掩码图像建模表现良好，并在这些任务上显示出极具竞争力的性能。

items.en: The core idea of our framework is to reformulate most vision tasks such as depth estimation, semantic segmentation, instance segmentation, keypoint detection and image restoration as an image inpainting problem. To do so, we redefine the output space of those tasks as “images”.
items.zh: 我们框架的核心思想是将大多数视觉任务（如深度估计、语义分割、实例分割、关键点检测和图像恢复）重新表述为图像修复问题。为此，我们将这些任务的输出空间重新定义为“图像”。

full.secZh: 3.1 将输出空间重定义为“图像”

items.en: We denote an input image as 𝐱𝐱\bf{x} with the size of H×W×3𝐻𝑊3H\times W\times 3, and standard definition of the task ground truth as 𝐲tsuperscript𝐲𝑡{\bf y}^{t} which has various sizes for different task t𝑡t, and we redefine these task outputs still in the image space, denoting as 𝐲^tsuperscript^𝐲𝑡{\hat{\bf y}}^{t} with the size of H×W×3𝐻𝑊3{H}\times{W}\times 3. Our philosophy is to keep the spatial relationships between pixels to be intact, and each pixel of the output image still represents the output for this task of the corresponding input image pixel but in the RGB space. That is, 𝐲^i,jtsubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j} with three dimensions denotes the corresponding ground truth of input pixel 𝐱i,jsubscript𝐱𝑖𝑗{\bf x}_{i,j}. We select seven representative vision tasks with diverse types of outputs, such as depth estimation, semantic segmentation, keypoint detection and panoptic segmentation. Here we show how we redefine the per pixel ground-truth for each task as a 3-channel tensor, similar to the RGB space. Note that in theory, a fixed number of output channels can serve our purpose. We choose 3 channels to make an image.
items.zh: 我们将输入图像表示为𝐱，大小为H×W×3，任务t的标准真值定义为𝐲^t，其大小因任务而异，我们将这些任务输出重新定义在图像空间中，表示为𝐲̂^t，大小为H×W×3。我们的理念是保持像素之间的空间关系不变，输出图像的每个像素仍然表示对应输入图像像素在该任务上的输出，但位于RGB空间中。也就是说，𝐲̂^t_{i,j}具有三个维度，表示输入像素𝐱_{i,j}的对应真值。我们选择了七个具有不同类型输出的代表性视觉任务，例如深度估计、语义分割、关键点检测和全景分割。这里我们展示如何将每个任务的逐像素真值重新定义为类似于RGB空间的3通道张量。注意，理论上，固定数量的输出通道可以满足我们的目的。我们选择3个通道来构成图像。

items.en: is a dense prediction task with weak semantics, to estimate the per-pixel depth value (distance relative to the camera) given an input RGB image. For NYUv2 [37], the per-pixel ground-truth depth 𝐲i,jtsubscriptsuperscript𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗{\bf y}^{t}_{i,j} is a real value in the range of [0,10]010[0,10] meters. Here we map the ground-truth value from real-valued range [0,10]010[0,10] to the integer space with range [0,255]0255[0,255], 𝐲^i,j,0t=⌊𝐲i,jt×25510⌋subscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗0subscriptsuperscript𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗25510{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,0}=\lfloor{\bf y}^{t}_{i,j}\times\frac{255}{10}\rfloor, and let the three channels 𝐲^i,j,0tsubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗0{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,0}, 𝐲^i,j,1tsubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗1{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,1} and 𝐲^i,j,2tsubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗2{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,2} be the same ground truth. In inference, we directly average the outputs of the three channels and then perform the inverse linear transformation of the training to obtain a depth estimate in the range of [0,10]010[0,10].
items.zh: 深度估计是一个弱语义的密集预测任务，用于估计给定输入RGB图像的逐像素深度值（相对于相机的距离）。对于NYUv2[37]，逐像素真值深度𝐲^t_{i,j}是[0,10]米范围内的实数值。这里我们将真值从实数值范围[0,10]映射到整数空间[0,255]，𝐲̂^t_{i,j,0}=⌊𝐲^t_{i,j}×255/10⌋，并让三个通道𝐲̂^t_{i,j,0}、𝐲̂^t_{i,j,1}和𝐲̂^t_{i,j,2}相同。在推理中，我们直接平均三个通道的输出，然后执行训练时的逆线性变换，得到[0,10]范围内的深度估计。

items.en: is a dense prediction task with strong semantics, to predict the per-pixel semantic label given an input image. Given a semantic segmentation task with L𝐿L categories, we let the RGB space to represent these L𝐿L categories with the same margin in each space. We represent L𝐿L as a 3-digit number with b𝑏b-base system, where b=⌈L13⌉𝑏superscript𝐿13b={\lceil L^{\frac{1}{3}}\rceil}, and 𝐲^i,j,0tsubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗0{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,0}, 𝐲^i,j,1tsubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗1{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,1} and 𝐲^i,j,2tsubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗2{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,2} represent their hundreds, tens and ones places, with a margin defined as m=⌊256b⌋𝑚256𝑏m=\lfloor\frac{256}{b}\rfloor. For example, ADE-20K [54] has 150 semantic categories with one background class, thus we set the base as b=6𝑏6b=6, and the margin as m=42𝑚42m=42. The output channels are defined as 𝐲^i,j,0t=⌊lb2⌋×msubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗0𝑙superscript𝑏2𝑚{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,0}=\lfloor\frac{l}{b^{2}}\rfloor\times m, 𝐲^i,j,1t=⌊lb⌋modb×msubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗1modulo𝑙𝑏𝑏𝑚{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,1}=\lfloor\frac{l}{b}\rfloor\mod b\times m, and 𝐲^i,j,2t=lmodb×msubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗2modulo𝑙𝑏𝑚{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,2}=l\mod b\times m, where l𝑙l denotes the corresponding category and is an integer value in range of [0,L)0𝐿[0,L). In inference, we discretize the output of each pixel with the margin m𝑚m and obtain its corresponding category.
items.zh: 语义分割是一个强语义的密集预测任务，用于预测给定输入图像的逐像素语义标签。给定一个具有L类别的语义分割任务，我们让RGB空间以每个空间相同的间隔表示这L个类别。我们将L表示为b进制下的3位数，其中b=⌈L^{1/3}⌉，𝐲̂^t_{i,j,0}、𝐲̂^t_{i,j,1}和𝐲̂^t_{i,j,2}分别表示百位、十位和个位，间隔定义为m=⌊256/b⌋。例如，ADE-20K[54]有150个语义类别和一个背景类，因此我们设置基数为b=6，间隔为m=42。输出通道定义为𝐲̂^t_{i,j,0}=⌊l/b^2⌋×m，𝐲̂^t_{i,j,1}=⌊l/b⌋ mod b×m，𝐲̂^t_{i,j,2}=l mod b×m，其中l表示对应类别，是[0,L)范围内的整数值。在推理中，我们以间隔m离散化每个像素的输出，并得到其对应类别。

items.en: is a fine-grained localization task to simultaneously detect the objects (e.g., human) and localize their detailed keypoints. We follow recent heatmap-based top-down pipeline [46], thus it is defined as a 17-category point-localization task for human keypoint detection. For each keypoint, we need to localize it to its corresponding pixel, which is very fine-grained. We decouple this task into a combination of 17-category keypoint classification using two channels of 𝐲^i,j,1tsubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗1{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,1} and 𝐲^i,j,2tsubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗2{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,2}, and class-agnostic keypoint localization using another channel of 𝐲^i,j,0tsubscriptsuperscript^𝐲𝑡𝑖𝑗0{\hat{\bf y}}^{t}_{i,j,0}. For the 17-category classification task, we define each keypoint as a 9×\times9 pixel square, and define the color of each square using the approach in semantic segmentation. For the class-agnostic point localization task, we define 17 squares, each of which is a 17×\times17 heatmap with Gaussian distribution that the center pixel with largest value of 255 is the position of the ground truth keypoint. In inference, we obtain the category and location for each keypoint as the final results from the 3-channel output image.
items.zh: 关键点检测是一个细粒度定位任务，用于同时检测物体（例如人体）并定位其详细关键点。我们遵循最近基于热图的从上到下流程[46]，因此将其定义为人体关键点检测的17类别点定位任务。对于每个关键点，我们需要将其定位到对应的像素，这非常精细。我们将此任务分解为使用𝐲̂^t_{i,j,1}和𝐲̂^t_{i,j,2}两个通道的17类别关键点分类，以及使用另一个通道𝐲̂^t_{i,j,0}的类别无关关键点定位。对于17类别分类任务，我们将每个关键点定义为9×9像素的正方形，并使用语义分割中的方法定义每个正方形的颜色。对于类别无关的点定位任务，我们定义17个正方形，每个都是17×17的热图，具有高斯分布，中心像素值为255，是真值关键点的位置。在推理中，我们从3通道输出图像中获得每个关键点的类别和位置作为最终结果。

items.en: is a combination of semantic segmentation task and instance segmentation task. Thus, we perform these two tasks separately for ease of redefinition of output space and optimization, and then combine their results to obtain the results for panoptic segmentation.
items.zh: 全景分割是语义分割任务和实例分割任务的组合。因此，为了便于输出空间的重定义和优化，我们分别执行这两个任务，然后组合它们的结果以获得全景分割的结果。

items.en: Here we introduce the redefinition of output space of class-agnostic instance segmentation. For this task, we directly change the color of each instance mask in the image to the same one, thus different instances use different colors. In theory, we can randomly choose colors for different instances, but we find that this setting would make the model hard to optimize. To address this optimization issue, we follow SOLO [42] to assign the color of each instance mask according to the absolute position of its center in the image. We conceptually divide the image into 16×\times20×\times20 blocks, corresponding to three channels respectively. We assign a fixed color to each block, then color the mask accordingly if its center locates in that block. In inference, we adopt each color as a kernel to compute the distance with each pixel in the image, and then set a threshold to get the final masks. To get the category for each instance mask, we directly assign the majority category in the semantic segmentation result within each instance mask as its category.
items.zh: 这里我们介绍类别无关实例分割的输出空间重定义。对于此任务，我们直接将图像中每个实例掩码的颜色改为相同颜色，因此不同实例使用不同颜色。理论上，我们可以为不同实例随机选择颜色，但我们发现这种设置会使模型难以优化。为了解决这个优化问题，我们遵循SOLO[42]，根据实例中心在图像中的绝对位置为每个实例掩码分配颜色。我们将图像概念上分为16×20×20个块，分别对应三个通道。我们为每个块分配固定颜色，然后如果实例中心位于该块中，则相应地为掩码着色。在推理中，我们将每种颜色作为核，计算与图像中每个像素的距离，然后设置阈值以获得最终掩码。为了获得每个实例掩码的类别，我们直接分配每个实例掩码内语义分割结果中的多数类别作为其类别。

items.en: takes the corrupted image as input and outputs the corresponding clean image. In this paper, we investigate three representative image restoration tasks, including image denoising, image deraining, and low-light image enhancement. Since both the input and output are inherently defined in the RGB space, these tasks can be seamlessly unified in our Painter model without any transformation.
items.zh: 将损坏图像作为输入并输出相应的干净图像。本文研究了三种代表性的图像恢复任务，包括图像去噪、图像去雨和低光照图像增强。由于输入和输出本质上都在RGB空间中定义，这些任务可以在我们的Painter模型中无缝统一，无需任何转换。

items.capEn: Figure 1: The training pipeline of the masked image modeling (MIM) framework.
items.capZh: 图1：掩码图像建模（MIM）框架的训练流程。

items.en: Based on the redefinition of the output spaces of above representative vision tasks, the input and output of these tasks are all images. Thus, here we directly apply a standard masked image modeling (MIM) pipeline [5, 48, 19] for training, illustrated in Figure 1. This framework consists of three major components: input format, architecture and loss function.
items.zh: 基于上述代表性视觉任务输出空间的重新定义，这些任务的输入和输出都是图像。因此，我们直接应用标准的掩码图像建模（MIM）流程[5, 48, 19]进行训练，如图1所示。该框架包含三个主要组件：输入格式、架构和损失函数。

items.en: During training, each input sample is the concatenation of two pairs of images from the same task, which have already been applied data augmentations separately, as shown in the left part of Figure 1. Each image pair consists of one image and its corresponding task output, which is also redefined as an image. We randomly mask the task output image and train the model to reconstruct the missing pixels. For the masked area, we follow the NLP community [38, 32] and previous works [5, 48, 19] to use a learnable token vector to replace each masked patch. We adopt the block-wise masking strategy and find the masking ratio as 75% to work well.
items.zh: 在训练过程中，每个输入样本是来自同一任务的两对图像的拼接，这些图像已分别应用数据增强，如图1左侧所示。每对图像包含一张图像及其对应的任务输出，该输出也被重新定义为图像。我们随机掩码任务输出图像，并训练模型重建缺失像素。对于掩码区域，我们遵循NLP社区[38, 32]和先前工作[5, 48, 19]的做法，使用可学习的标记向量替换每个掩码块。我们采用块级掩码策略，发现掩码比例为75%时效果良好。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Visualizations of examples and predictions obtained by our Painter for different tasks, such as semantic segmentation, depth estimation, instance segmentation, human keypoint detection, image denoising, image deraining and low-light image enhancement. Best viewed on screen.
items.capZh: 图2：我们的Painter在不同任务（如语义分割、深度估计、实例分割、人体关键点检测、图像去噪、图像去雨和低光照图像增强）上的示例和预测可视化。建议在屏幕上查看。

items.en: We adopt a vanilla vision Transformer (ViT) [14] as the encoder, which consists of stacked Transformer blocks, e.g., 24 blocks for ViT-large. We concatenate 4 feature maps evenly sampled from these blocks and use a simple three-layer head to map the features of each patch to its original resolution, e.g., 16×16×31616316\times 16\times 3. Specifically, the head consists of a linear (1×\times1 convolution) layer, a 3×\times3 convolution layer, and another linear layer.
items.zh: 我们采用普通的视觉Transformer（ViT）[14]作为编码器，由堆叠的Transformer块组成，例如ViT-large有24个块。我们从这些块中均匀采样4个特征图，并使用简单的三层头部将每个块的特征映射到其原始分辨率，例如16×16×3。具体来说，头部由一个线性（1×1卷积）层、一个3×3卷积层和另一个线性层组成。

items.en: Since each input sample includes both the input image and its output image, the input resolution can be larger than the traditional training process, and also the computation cost. To address this problem, we propose to reduce the computation cost by merging the early features of the input image and the output image. Specifically, we feed the input image and the output image to the model in parallel, then add their features patch by patch after a few blocks, e.g., 3 blocks by default. This design saves nearly half of the computation costs, but we find no degradation in performance.
items.zh: 由于每个输入样本包含输入图像及其输出图像，输入分辨率可能大于传统训练过程，计算成本也更高。为解决此问题，我们提出通过合并输入图像和输出图像的早期特征来降低计算成本。具体来说，我们并行地将输入图像和输出图像输入模型，然后在几个块（默认3个块）之后逐块添加它们的特征。这种设计节省了近一半的计算成本，但我们发现性能没有下降。

items.en: We use a simple regression loss to train Painter. Specifically, smooth-ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} [16] loss is computed on the masked pixels. We also consider ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} and ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} in our experiments, and we find that the smooth-ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} loss achieves the best performance.
items.zh: 我们使用简单的回归损失来训练Painter。具体来说，在掩码像素上计算平滑ℓ1损失[16]。我们在实验中也考虑了ℓ1和ℓ2损失，发现平滑ℓ1损失取得了最佳性能。

items.en: At the first time, we design an in-context inference procedure, which is very flexible for performing both in-domain and out-of-domain vision tasks. As the input and output spaces of vision tasks have been unified as images, we can directly use the input/output paired images from the same task as the input condition (task prompts) to indicate which task to perform, and concatenate them with the input image and a masked image for completing the corresponding task. Examples are shown in Figure LABEL:fig:teaser. This definition of task prompt does not require deep understanding of language instructions like previous approaches, but uses the visual signal as context which can be understood by the vision model and well matches the nature of the visual domain.
items.zh: 首次，我们设计了一种上下文推理过程，该过程非常灵活，可用于执行域内和域外视觉任务。由于视觉任务的输入和输出空间已统一为图像，我们可以直接使用来自同一任务的输入/输出配对图像作为输入条件（任务提示）来指示要执行的任务，并将它们与输入图像和掩码图像拼接，以完成相应任务。示例见图LABEL:fig:teaser。这种任务提示的定义不需要像先前方法那样深入理解语言指令，而是使用视觉信号作为上下文，这可以被视觉模型理解，并很好地匹配视觉领域的本质。

items.en: Also, different task prompts would lead to different results. Thus, how to select or generate a more suitable task prompt can be a new direction to explore. Here we present two simple baselines and we leave more explorations as the future work. The first baseline is to obtain a better prompt via selection, that we traverse the whole training set in a heuristic manner and select the best-performing example pair for each task. The second baseline is to generate a task prompt. We define the task prompt as the learnable tensors, freeze the whole model, and then use the training loss to optimize the task prompts. We compare these two solutions with the random counterpart in the experiments with the visualizations, as shown in §4.3.
items.zh: 此外，不同的任务提示会导致不同的结果。因此，如何选择或生成更合适的任务提示是一个值得探索的新方向。这里我们提出两个简单的基线，并将更多探索留作未来工作。第一个基线是通过选择获得更好的提示：我们以启发式方式遍历整个训练集，并为每个任务选择性能最佳的示例对。第二个基线是生成任务提示：我们将任务提示定义为可学习张量，冻结整个模型，然后使用训练损失优化任务提示。我们在实验中将这两种解决方案与随机对应方案进行比较，并在§4.3中进行了可视化。

items.en: NYUv2 [37] dataset consists of 464 indoor scenes captured by a Microsoft Kinect camera. The official training split (24K images) is used for training, and we report the Root Mean Square Error (RMSE), absolute mean relative error (A.Rel) and the percentage of inside pixels with different thresholds of δ𝛿\delta on the 654 testing images from 215 indoor scenes.
items.zh: NYUv2 [37]数据集包含由微软Kinect相机捕获的464个室内场景。官方训练集（24K图像）用于训练，我们在来自215个室内场景的654张测试图像上报告均方根误差（RMSE）、绝对平均相对误差（A.Rel）以及不同δ阈值下的内部像素百分比。

items.en: ADE20K [54] is a widely-used semantic segmentation dataset, covering a broad range of 150 semantic categories. It has 25K images in total, with 20K for training, 2K for validation, and another 3K for testing. We adopt the widely-used metric of mean IoU (mIoU) for evaluation.
items.zh: ADE20K [54]是一个广泛使用的语义分割数据集，涵盖150个语义类别。共有25K张图像，其中20K用于训练，2K用于验证，另外3K用于测试。我们采用广泛使用的平均IoU（mIoU）指标进行评估。

items.en: MS-COCO [31] contains approximately 118K training images and 5K validation images used for evaluation, with 80 “things” and 53 “stuff” categories. Panoptic segmentation task is evaluated on the union of “things” and “stuff” categories. During training, we generate the output images of semantic segmentation with 133 categories, and the class-agnostic instance segmentation with only “things” categories. During inference, we perform inference twice for each input image to obtain the results of semantic segmentation and class-agnostic instance segmentation, respectively, then merge them together to get the results of panoptic segmentation. We report panoptic quality as the measure.
items.zh: MS-COCO [31]包含约118K张训练图像和5K张验证图像用于评估，有80个“物体”和53个“材料”类别。全景分割任务在“物体”和“材料”类别的并集上进行评估。训练时，我们生成133个类别的语义分割输出图像，以及仅包含“物体”类别的类别无关实例分割。推理时，我们对每张输入图像执行两次推理，分别获得语义分割和类别无关实例分割的结果，然后将它们合并得到全景分割结果。我们报告全景质量作为衡量指标。

items.en: For human keypoint detection, we use the standard person detection results from Simple Baseline [46], which use the standard splits on COCO with 15K training samples and validation set for evaluation, and report the AP based on OKS as the evaluation metric [46].
items.zh: 对于人体关键点检测，我们使用Simple Baseline [46]的标准人体检测结果，该结果使用COCO上的标准划分，包含15K训练样本和验证集进行评估，并报告基于OKS的AP作为评估指标[46]。

items.en: Image restoration tasks are evaluated on several popular benchmarks, including SIDD [1] for image denoising, LoL [45] for low-light image enhancement, and the merged deraining dataset [51] for deraining. More details about these datasets are provided in Table S1.
items.zh: 图像恢复任务在几个流行基准上进行评估，包括用于图像去噪的SIDD [1]、用于低光照图像增强的LoL [45]以及用于去雨的合并去雨数据集[51]。这些数据集的更多细节见表S1。

items.en: During training, we employ an AdamW optimizer [25] with a cosine learning rate scheduler, and train for 54K iterations. The training hyper-parameters are: the batch size as 2048, base learning rate as 1e𝑒e−33-3, weight decay as 0.05, β1=0.9subscript𝛽10.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.999subscript𝛽20.999\beta_{2}=0.999, drop path [20] ratio as 0.1, warm-up for 5.4K iterations. A light data augmentation strategy is used: random resize cropping with scale range of [0.3,1]0.31[0.3,1] and a aspect ratio range of [3/4,4/3]3443[\nicefrac{{3}}{{4}},\nicefrac{{4}}{{3}}], followed by a random flipping. The input image size is 448×448448448448\times 448 by default. The sampling weight for each task is 0.10.10.1 (NYUv2 depth estimation), 0.20.20.2 (ADE-20K semantic segmentation), 0.150.150.15 (COCO class-agnostic instance segmentation), 0.250.250.25 (COCO semantic segmentation), 0.20.20.2 (COCO human keypoint detection), 0.150.150.15 (image denoising), 0.050.050.05 image deraining, and 0.050.050.05 (low-light image enhancement).
items.zh: 训练过程中，我们使用AdamW优化器[25]和余弦学习率调度器，训练54K次迭代。训练超参数为：批量大小2048，基础学习率1e-3，权重衰减0.05，β1=0.9，β2=0.999，drop path [20]比率0.1，预热5.4K次迭代。使用轻量级数据增强策略：随机调整大小裁剪，尺度范围[0.3,1]，宽高比范围[3/4,4/3]，然后随机翻转。默认输入图像大小为448×448。每个任务的采样权重为：0.1（NYUv2深度估计），0.2（ADE-20K语义分割），0.15（COCO类别无关实例分割），0.25（COCO语义分割），0.2（COCO人体关键点检测），0.15（图像去噪），0.05（图像去雨），0.05（低光照图像增强）。

items.en: With the corresponding task prompts, we compare our approach, Painter, with recent best vision generalist models and specialized models on seven representative tasks, shown in Table 1. Without task-specific design, our Painter sets new records on NYUv2 depth estimation, outperforming not only vision generalists, such as Unified-IO [35] and UViM [27], but also the state-of-the-art specialized model, e.g., BinsFormer [30]. For COCO keypoint detection, Painter significantly outperforms the generalist model Pix2Seq v2 [10] by 7.3 AP. For ADE-20K semantic segmentation, COCO panoptic segmentation, and the three low-level image processing tasks, our model achieves comparable performance to those well-designed task-specific models. There is still much room for boosting our approach compared to other well-designed specialized models. For example, our default input image size is 448×448448448448\times 448 while those specialized panoptic segmentation models use a much larger resolution, e.g., 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 in Mask2Former [11]. Achieving state-of-the-art performance on every task is not the major goal of this paper, and we leave this as future work.
items.zh: 使用相应的任务提示，我们将我们的方法Painter与最近最佳的视觉通用模型和专用模型在七个代表性任务上进行比较，如表1所示。无需任务特定设计，我们的Painter在NYUv2深度估计上创下新纪录，不仅优于视觉通用模型（如Unified-IO [35]和UViM [27]），也优于最先进的专用模型（如BinsFormer [30]）。在COCO关键点检测上，Painter以7.3 AP显著优于通用模型Pix2Seq v2 [10]。在ADE-20K语义分割、COCO全景分割以及三个低级图像处理任务上，我们的模型取得了与精心设计的任务特定模型相当的性能。与设计良好的专用模型相比，我们的方法仍有很大提升空间。例如，我们的默认输入图像大小为448×448，而专用全景分割模型使用更大的分辨率，如Mask2Former [11]中的1024×1024。在每个任务上达到最先进性能并非本文的主要目标，我们将其留作未来工作。

items.en: We compare two training settings, i.e., joint training and separate training, in Table 2. For the separate training setting, we train each model separately on each task with the same number of iterations and architectures as joint training on this task. We can observe that models with joint training generally outperform that with separate training on most of the tasks, indicating that our in-context training approach with the unification of output spaces can somewhat benefit them from each other. But conflict may still exist, e.g., joint training performs slightly worse on keypoint detection. Exploring the relationships between tasks in our simple and unified framework could be an interesting and promising direction.
items.zh: 我们在表2中比较了两种训练设置，即联合训练和单独训练。对于单独训练设置，我们在每个任务上单独训练模型，迭代次数和架构与联合训练相同。我们可以观察到，联合训练的模型在大多数任务上通常优于单独训练的模型，这表明我们的上下文训练方法通过输出空间的统一可以在一定程度上使任务相互受益。但冲突可能仍然存在，例如联合训练在关键点检测上表现稍差。在我们简单统一的框架中探索任务之间的关系可能是一个有趣且有前景的方向。

items.en: To demonstrate the capability of our generalist model in an intuitive perspective, we visualize the task output of the selected images from the validation set of several in-domain tasks, such as semantic segmentation, depth estimation, instance segmentation, human keypoint detection, image denoising, image deraining, and low-light image enhancement. As shown in Figure 2, Painter can make very accurate predictions on all these tasks.
items.zh: 为了直观展示我们通用模型的能力，我们可视化了几个域内任务（如语义分割、深度估计、实例分割、人体关键点检测、图像去噪、图像去雨和低光照图像增强）验证集中选定图像的任务输出。如图2所示，Painter可以在所有这些任务上做出非常准确的预测。

items.en: Different task prompts would lead to varied results. Here we compare three simple baselines, ‘random’, ‘searched’ and ‘learned’ prompts. Random prompts denote to randomly select one example from that task as the prompt. Searched prompt denotes to traverse the training set in a heuristic manner and select the best-performing example pair for each task. Learned prompt denotes that we define the task prompt as the learnable tensors, freeze the whole model, and then use the training loss to optimize the task prompts.
items.zh: 不同的任务提示会导致不同的结果。这里我们比较三个简单的基线：'随机'、'搜索'和'学习'提示。随机提示表示从该任务中随机选择一个示例作为提示。搜索提示表示以启发式方式遍历训练集，并为每个任务选择性能最佳的示例对。学习提示表示我们将任务提示定义为可学习张量，冻结整个模型，然后使用训练损失优化任务提示。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Visualizations of examples and predictions obtained by Painter, such as open-vocabulary keypoint detection (e.g., horse, monkey and broom), object segmentation (koala and butterfly) and instance segmentation (tablets).
items.capZh: 图3：Painter获得的示例和预测的可视化，例如开放词汇关键点检测（如马、猴子和扫帚）、物体分割（考拉和蝴蝶）以及实例分割（平板电脑）。

items.en: The qualitative comparisons are shown in Table 3 . We can see that the model using the searched and learned prompts perform better than that with random ones, which indicates that the optimization process helps the task to find a more suitable prompt. Also, the model with random prompts works relatively well, indicating the robustness of our model. In Figure S6, we show the visualizations of the learned prompt images for different tasks.
items.zh: 定性比较如表3所示。我们可以看到，使用搜索和学习到的提示的模型比使用随机提示的模型表现更好，这表明优化过程有助于任务找到更合适的提示。此外，使用随机提示的模型也表现相对良好，表明了我们模型的鲁棒性。在图S6中，我们展示了不同任务的学习提示图像的可视化。

items.en: It is very promising that the performance of a task can be improved by optimizing the input prompt. This provides the possibility that if a category or task does not appear in the training data, we can still achieve relatively good performance on this task by optimizing the prompts, without tuning the parameters of the model, which is also one core advantage of in-context learning.
items.zh: 非常有前景的是，通过优化输入提示可以提高任务的性能。这提供了这样一种可能性：如果某个类别或任务未出现在训练数据中，我们仍然可以通过优化提示在该任务上获得相对较好的性能，而无需调整模型参数，这也是上下文学习的一个核心优势。

items.en: The core property of in-context learning is that it allows the model to rapidly adapt to various tasks with only a handful of prompts and examples. Here, we explore this capability via visualizations, shown in Figure LABEL:fig:teaser, Figure 3, and Figure S5. From these visualizations, we find that our model can perform the task seen in training but with input images that their categories are unseen in training, such as open-vocabulary keypoint detection (e.g., monkey, horse and broom), object segmentation (koala) and instance segmentation (tablets). In addition, we quantitatively evaluate Painter on a few-shot segmentation benchmark which requires to segment objects of 1k novel classes. Painter largely outperforms a concurrent work [6], as reported in Table 4,
items.zh: 上下文学习的核心特性是它允许模型仅凭少量提示和示例快速适应各种任务。在这里，我们通过可视化探索了这一能力，如图LABEL:fig:teaser、图3和图S5所示。从这些可视化中，我们发现我们的模型可以执行训练中见过的任务，但输入图像的类别在训练中未见，例如开放词汇关键点检测（如猴子、马和扫帚）、物体分割（考拉）和实例分割（平板电脑）。此外，我们在一个需要分割1k个新类别物体的少样本分割基准上定量评估了Painter。Painter大幅优于同期工作[6]，如表4所示。

items.en: In this work, for the first time, we explore how to perform in-context visual learning and present a vision-centric solution in which the context is defined as visual signals. Thus, the models are granted with the capability to perform tasks conditioned on the paired data from that task, that is, in-context inference. Our approach achieves highly competitive performance on a representative and diverse set of seven tasks.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们首次探索了如何进行上下文视觉学习，并提出了一种以视觉为中心的解决方案，其中上下文被定义为视觉信号。因此，模型被赋予了根据该任务的配对数据执行任务的能力，即上下文推理。我们的方法在七个代表性且多样化的任务上取得了极具竞争力的性能。

items.en: This work is not without drawbacks. First, there is still much room for boosting our approach especially on the difficult task of panoptic segmentation, comparing to the specialized models. In addition, since our approach is designed based on visual signals as contexts, this general interface does not seem natural for modeling language signals. How to model discrete language signals as continuous ones seems to be an impressive direction, and some work has started to emerge recently.
items.zh: 这项工作并非没有缺点。首先，与专门模型相比，我们的方法仍有很大提升空间，尤其是在全景分割这一困难任务上。此外，由于我们的方法基于视觉信号作为上下文设计，这种通用接口似乎不自然地适用于建模语言信号。如何将离散的语言信号建模为连续的信号似乎是一个令人印象深刻的方向，最近已有一些工作开始出现。

items.en: While there are previous approaches that hope to use general interfaces to solve multiple vision tasks, we may be the first to grant models the ability to learn and complete tasks in context, which does have the opportunity to handle out-of-domain tasks. We hope this work will draw attention to this promising direction, and we believe that the best GPT-3 moment in the vision field is yet to come.
items.zh: 尽管之前有方法希望使用通用接口来解决多个视觉任务，但我们可能是第一个赋予模型在上下文中学习和完成任务的能力的方法，这确实有机会处理域外任务。我们希望这项工作能引起对这一有前景方向的关注，并且我们相信视觉领域最好的GPT-3时刻尚未到来。

items.en: This project is supported by the National Key R&D Program of China (2020AAA0105200). We would like to thank Hanxiao Qu, Yemin Shi, Yan Tian, and Xigang Cao for their help on the GPU resources, Xinxin Liu and Kai Lu for beautifying the figures, as well as other colleagues at Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence for support throughout this project.
items.zh: 本项目得到国家重点研发计划（2020AAA0105200）的支持。我们感谢韩晓曲、叶敏实、田岩和曹西刚在GPU资源上的帮助，刘欣欣和卢凯在美化图形上的帮助，以及北京人工智能研究院的其他同事在整个项目中的支持。
